# RugCheck AI

> On-chain token-safety MCP for Solana AI agents. Reads a token's mint directly to flag rug &
> honeypot traps (mint/freeze authority, Token-2022 extensions) before trading, then builds an
> unsigned, Jito-tipped Jupiter buy for tokens that pass. Built with Python
> (FastMCP); entry point server.py; screening is read-only, execution returns an unsigned tx.

Remote endpoint: https://web-production-58d585.up.railway.app/mcp
Registry: io.github.MrWizardlyLoaf/rugcheck-ai

## Use cases
Answers, before an agent buys: is this Solana token safe to buy or a rug pull; is it a honeypot (can
I actually sell after buying); does the mint have an active freeze/mint authority; is there a hidden
Token-2022 trap (permanent delegate, transfer hook) that drains the buyer. Pre-trade screening and
token due-diligence for autonomous Solana trading agents, snipers and bots.

## Docs
- [README](https://github.com/MrWizardlyLoaf/rugcheck-ai/blob/main/README.md): overview, tools, connect
- [Source server.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MrWizardlyLoaf/rugcheck-ai/main/server.py): full server code
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/MrWizardlyLoaf/rugcheck-ai/blob/main/AGENTS.md): quickstart for agents

## Tools
- scan_token(mint): full safety report — authority, Token-2022 traps, honeypot, liquidity, holder concentration → SAFE/CAUTION/DANGER + 0-100 score
- is_safe(mint): quick yes/no gate — one boolean before trading
- verify_token_safety(mint): on-chain safety audit (authority + Token-2022 traps + live market)
- check_authorities(mint): mint/freeze authority + extension detection
- simulate_sell(mint): honeypot / sellability check
- simulate_trade(mint, amount_usd): round-trip buy→sell — real entry/exit cost & loss %
- check_liquidity(mint): DEX liquidity, 24h volume, age, buys/sells
- holders_breakdown(mint): top-holder concentration (dump risk)
- token_age(mint): freshness + trading activity
- rug_forecast(mint): heuristic rug ETA — probability + urgency + factors
- scammer_dna(mint): intent score (0-100) from structural scam signals
- check_deployer(mint): the wallets that hold power over the token
- compare_tokens(mints): rank a basket safest-first
- batch_scan(mints): scan up to 10 tokens at once, one report each
- execute_safe_swap(mint, wallet, amount_usd): re-screened, Jito-tipped execution (refuses DANGER); returns unsigned tx
